issues.title: Damage spike on floor 2 encounter 2
issues.description: Enemy dealt 15 damage when player had 9 HP (166.7% of current HP). This exceeds the 50% threshold.
reproductionSteps: Start run with seed 100, profile scholar-expert

issues.title: Player defeated on floor 3
issues.description: Player was defeated on floor 3 (early game). Defeated by crystal_warden (boss) with accuracy 91.7%.
reproductionSteps: Start run with seed 100, profile scholar-expert

issues.title: Difficulty spike on floor 3 encounter 0
issues.description: Encounter against crystal_golem took 5 turns to resolve, more than 2x the previous floor's average of 2.3 turns. This indicates a sudden difficulty increase.
reproductionSteps: Start run with seed 100, profile scholar-expert

issues.title: Card type "wild" never played
issues.description: The "wild" card type was never used during this playthrough. This may indicate the card type is unavailable, underpowered, or the player's deck/archetype doesn't include it.
reproductionSteps: Start run with seed 100, profile scholar-expert
Monitor card type distribution during run
Check if "wild" cards appear in deck
